topic: There is a child's car seat buckled in my back seat every morning but I have no children
title: There Is a Child's Car Seat Buckled in My Back Seat Every Morning. I Have No Children. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There is a child's car seat buckled into my back seat every morning. I have no children.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a worn grey child's car seat buckled into the back seat of a small car, dim interior morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I drive a two door coupe. I am single. The car lives in a locked garage.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a two door coupe parked inside a locked garage, dim bulb light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of an empty driver seat and steering wheel, morning light through the windshield, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One Monday a small grey car seat was strapped in behind me. Worn. Used.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a small worn grey child car seat strapped into a back seat, faint stains on the fabric, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
wide shot of a child car seat sitting on top of a curbside garbage bin, grey daylight, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Tuesday it was back. Buckled tighter.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of the same car seat back in the vehicle with the straps pulled tight, dim interior, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I searched the car for a child.
scenes.image_prompt: close interior shot of a car back seat being inspected, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Crumbs on the seat. A juice cup in the holder.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of cracker crumbs scattered on a car seat and a juice cup in a door holder, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each morning the straps are looser, like a child is growing into it.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a child car seat with loosened straps in a back seat, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last week I heard humming from the back at a red light. The mirror showed the seat empty.
scenes.image_prompt: interior shot of a rearview mirror reflecting an empty child car seat in the back, dim red light from a traffic signal, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I sold the car. Took the bus for a month.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an empty parking space where a car used to be, an oil stain on the concrete, grey light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning there was a car seat on my bus seat. Buckled to nothing.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a child car seat strapped to a city bus bench seat, empty, dim interior bus light, vertical 9:16 framing
